steps.evidence: Dirty Coordinator work was preserved; the candidate was built in a new standalone repository.

Five development and three held-out cases, source hashes, questions, answer keys, limits, overclaims, frozen ordinary prose, lanes, and scorecard exist.
steps.limit: The frozen ordinary prose was authored in the implementation session; generate fresh no-skill runtime baselines before final semantic scoring.

steps.evidence: One Markdown-first native skill, one conditional reference, OpenAI metadata, implicit invocation, complete interactive fallback, official validation, and exact cross-runtime sync pass.
Explicit selectors, Easify natural phrase, Easyfi compatibility phrase, PR surface loading, public-action boundary, and simple negative control passed in both runtimes.
steps.remaining: Run the complete repeated positive and negative suite during dogfood; natural model-selected activation is measured rather than deterministic.

steps.evidence: Deterministic prompt generator, separate packaging/semantic/renderer lanes, frozen answers, hidden-label scorecard, and hard-failure criteria exist.
steps.remaining: Generate the arms in fresh sessions and collect Richard and cold-reader comprehension results.

steps.evidence: Native skill is available user-wide for test driving without changing production Coordinator method ownership.
steps.remaining: Only after the POC floor passes, replace the production local Easyfi method with a native-skill pointer.
Plan, report, Grill Me, PR, docs, idea, complex local interactive, and tiny cases.

steps.evidence: The direct-folder installer is idempotent, preserves one authority, and rejects real-directory conflicts in an isolated temporary root.
